data.page_content:
Welcome to the Divoom API

    
##### command description

- Exit custom display mode.

##### Request URL
- ` http://IP:9000/divoom_api `
  
##### Request method
- GET 

##### para

|Name|DATA TYPE|DESCRIPTION|
|:----    |:----- |-----   |
|Command |string |Device/ExitCustomControlMode  |

##### respone example 

``` 
  {
    "ReturnCode": 0
  }
```

##### Return value 

|Name|DATA TYPE|DESCRIPTION|
|:-----  |:-----|-----                           |
|ReturnCode |number   |0  |
